title: Adoption of operations by another
doc_html:
§44.  Adoption of operations by another

A mineral servitude owner may adopt operations or production by a person other than those designated by Article 42 if his servitude includes the right to conduct operations of the kind involved.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §44, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
